channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: /smg/ - stock market genera — 334 replies — 1336.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
/smg/ - stock market genera

Open thread • Replies: 334 • Updated: 2026-06-29 17:55 UTC

OP

Too infinity and beyond edish

>Educational sites:
https://www.investopedia.com

>Financial TV Streams:
https://www.newslive.com/american/cnbc.html
https://www.livestreamy.net/bloomberg/

>Charts:
https://www.tradingview.com
https://www.finscreener.com
https://www.portfoliovisualizer.com

>Screeners:
https://finviz.com/
https://etfdb.com/

>Gambling:
https://www.optionsplaybook.com/options-introduction/
https://www.optionsprofitcalculator.com
https://optionstrat.com/
https://www.optionistics.com/quotes/option-prices

>Pre-Market and Live data:
https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures
https://finance.yahoo.com/

>Calendars:
https://www.marketwatch.com/economy-politics/calendar
https://www.earningswhispers.com/calendar
https://www.cmegroup.com/trading/interest-rates/countdown-to-fomc.html
https://www.mortgagenewsdaily.com/data/building-permits

>Boomer Investing 101:
https://www.bogleheads.org/wiki/Getting_started
https://www.sec.gov/search-filings

>Misc:
https://www.financialjuice.com/home
https://finance.yahoo.com/trending-tickers
https://market24hclock.com/
https://www.dividendchannel.com/drip-returns-calculator
https://brokerchooser.com/
https://www.chathamfinancial.com/technology/us-market-rates''

Previous:>>62426231

Early replies (first 3)

62426857
> nows

62426858
>we project chips to grow 1000% per quarter every quarter until 2035 atleast

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62427421
I bought Microsoft calls. See you all at 700

62427423
reminder that the market is closed july 3rd

62427424
>>62427418

62427425
>>62427401

its not a lie. the more theta the closer the option is to acting exactly like 100 shares

62427426
Sorry but I don’t buy it.

I just don’t buy it

Wars over or at least he wants it to be.
Private credit is sorted.
There is no reason why grinding out another 10th pump with government money is needed or makes sense.

Don may want it.
But there’s no longer a patriotic, religious, or economic reason to support it, it’s just him buying his way out of 200 subpoenas per hour if the dems sweep.

62427428
>>62427421
chad. Reddit is full of retards who get blown up and 4chan is full of pussies who never grow

62427430
>>62427411
>Even when this lame AI / memory shakeout is done they’ll just shapeshift back into whatever’s popular.
nothing is even being shaken out, Micron didn't even go below the 10 day moving average.

62427433
>>62427424
The guiness rally never happened

62427436
>>62427426
>Private credit is sorted.
i stopped following it for a bit has it actually? last i checked PE funds were taking loans against the assets of their funds to pay out pension funds because they could not unlock their liqudity

62427437
https://archive.is/L0xpr
>CXMT primarily makes DRAM, not NAND flash, so this is really only a threat to half of Micron's business
These are the retards driving our losses.

62427440
>>62427409
ok I can get behind that, but sincere question bc I don't understand and maybe it's smart
Why would you prefer this?

62427442
>>62427428
Sir, I am actually retarded and a pussy

62427446
I hate nvidia so much what a shit stock
Should have bought tesla

62427447
>>62427436
You’re referring to the Reddit post which is very late.

Banks that had been taking losses got bailed out by printing and in their latest 10ks had cleared it all up.

The only one who stands to gain from more pumping is Don

62427449
>>62427413
lel, I see that you're a professional top buyer.
around august 19th you'll have an exit, assuming this circus keeps going for that long because the moment the market takes into account a (the) rate hike we're going down 15 to 20%

62427450
>>62427447
got any articles on the current state of PE would love to read how it has progressed

62427451
>>62427430
It’s currently being suppressed via crabbing, or crabpression. In theory memory should be up just as corning or cisco or the rest of the AI adjacents but it’s not. That’s why it’s a ‘lame’ shakeout.

62427453
>>62427425
It was partially in jest, but why would anon do this?

62427454
>>62427315
>Nancy
This isn't working for nvidia
Pathetic piece of shit can't even make $2

62427457
>>62427451
>should be up
Memory stocks have consistently underperformed where they would be in a bubble.

62427458
posting volume has gone down a fair bit how many mumus got liquidated last week, i am starting to miss them

62427459
>>62427437
CXMT doesn't have HBM fabs up until 2028, which is where Micron's actual business comes from since they dropped DDR5. CXMT would be filling a market niche micron doesn't care about.

62427461
>>62427459
>doesn't have HBM fabs up
Bro, it's the first time I heard about China having HBM anything. The post was about the tard confusing NAND and DRAM.

62427462
My GOOG doin a lil sum'

62427463
>RKLB

62427465
>>62427454
Well, nvidia is a divident stock now. I wouldn't expect much from them stock price-wise now.

62427467
>started green pre market
>shat the bed on open
>slightly green now
I mean I'll take it but stop playing with me...

62427469
>>62427423
Holidays should instead be Market celebrations where everything is 2x Leverage

62427473
why are we green
this shit makes no sense

62427480
>>62427467
>everyone who wanted to dump/sell did so
Take the drop as a good thing and a decently big bull signal for the near future. Should make the whole thing feel a bit nicer overall.

item.title: VOO and Chill — 152 replies — 447.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
VOO and Chill

Open thread • Replies: 152 • Updated: 2026-06-29 17:35 UTC

OP

The more I look into investing and compare the historical returns of certain ETFs / individual stocks it seems like the whole philosophy of “VOO and Chill” is equal parts really smart and retarded
It’s like a no brainer for money but even now as long as the market is in a growth period shouldn’t you at least do QQQ?
It seems so simple that’d you miss a lot of upside but the returns are honestly not bad and extremely consistent
How accurate is this assessment? It’s both so simple and guaranteed that everyone should it but also too safe so you end up missing out on more upside
I’m talking 5-20 years investing here not trading

Early replies (first 3)

62400515
Boomer funds are gay and lame

62400554
>>62400515
What qualifies as one
Why
What crypto do you want to shill

62400560
boglehead method is the tried and tested way, buy the market with an index fund that has a low fee, invest monthly, do it consistently for decades and you WILL be rich
but biz/anons don't care about being rich when they're older, they want to be rich NOW
greed is a deadly sin

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62422917
>>62422806
Okay but as someone with 55K sitting in VOO, just DCA each week, what should I look towards next
As Stated I was considering just beginning to go into DRAM for now and selling within 1 to 2 years

62422933
It's retarded unless you have like 2 million.
If you don't you have to take gambles.
Time is more important than money.

62422968
>>62422933
right but if you start young then you have time on your side so all you need to do is focus on making more money
it's an equation that always balances out, risk takes principal out of the equation and time

62422991
>>62421799
this is legitimately not true when compared to other indexes

62423039
>>62421799
>he thinks there will be another 08 event

62423048
>>62423039
have you seen the SP chart? Have you seen the state debt? have you seen the bond yield inversion?

62423061
>>62423039
>>62423048
Why does it matter if there is another 08 unless you plan to retire in 5-10 years

62423124
>>62422991
haha yeah

>>62423061
because your primary source of income would dry up under such conditions and you'll have to liquidate and partially realize your losses to pay your immediate obligations you chuckelfucking retard
>but i have cash reserves
really? enough to last you multiple years? i don't think so.

62423192
Are you a bad enough dude to hold and make it?

62423236
>>62423192
Is this a backtest or actual holdings in real time, I dont recognize the site UI

62423245
>>62423192
for reference, this is what Im rockin...

62423267
40/40/20 VDY/XEI/XEQT is extremely comfy for any Canadians reading this thread

62423719
>>62422917
retard he is telling you to risk adjust your allocations as you get older, when you're 60 it's more about capital preservation than getting high returns

62423769
this thread is getting dumber by the day

62423809
Using a reversion to the mean strategy on indexes, I managed to get a 17% CAGR over 54 years only trading indexes/ETFs (where data permits) on backtesting, significantly beating each individual index . More enquiry is warranted but I think "VOO and chill" can be improved upon and optimized.

62423821
>>62423719
he mentioned rn

62423875
>>62400636
It actually is something tho. $150 a month becomes 170k at 7% real returns for 30 years. This gives you an extra $570/mo in retirement.

Is that a LOT? Fuck no. But we’re talking poorfag standards where social security is the only thing you have. An extra 500-600 a month is a significant increase over base SS for a poorfag especially if you move to an ultra low cost of living area.

62423880
The reason i keep bringing up DRAM and other return stuff is because it's on my mind to go into that stuff now, sell, and then increase my VOO position even further - not to infinitely chase returns btw

62424100
>>62423880
I'm putting 20k into micron tomorrow. I feel like it's not to late for this to just keep going up. Its not going to 10x but 4-5, yeah...

62424179
>>62424100
why only micron, why not dram etf

62424607
>>62400636
>The problem is we have people starting at age 35 with like 150 a month thinking it's going to somehow mean something.
I'm in this and doing VT. Maybe I'll be ok probably not. Can do more than $150 though

62424664
I seriously cannot decide between just not thinking and doing broad ETFs and trying to chase this AI thing

62426022
>>62423236
>>62423245
It's a mostly unserious backtest, site was posted earlier >>62419980

>>62423769
Why not have some fun and make the most unhinged etf port possible??

62426103
>>62426022
Interesting thanks

62426138
I have been degenerately long-only various semiconductors since the april bottom and yet on 90% of days, I've underperformed soxl on the way up and outperformed it on the way down. After doing all my research and picking the right names and calculating the right options to buy, I should have thrown all my notes in the trash and just bought soxl. Even if this is the bubble top and soxl is about to go down 90%, I know from experience my stock picks will go down 95%. So I stay may as well buy soxl.

62426144
If I'm just starting out with this stuff, what's wrong with 70% VTI / 30% VXUS?

62426154
Honestly I’m seeing a lot of upside to going into QQQ over VOO as long as you are okay with the fact it is more volatile
The upside it’s just so huge when compounded

62426173
>>62426154
Or honestly, as someone already in VOO, I wonder if it makes sense to just go into something like VGT which has consistently beaten VOO and QQQ (for now anyway) or something like DRAM
A lot of VGTs holdings are currently down but it’s YTD is higher

62426183
>>62407078
I keep half of my funds in VTWAX, rebalancing annually. Right now I'm down 0.84% this year, my portfolio is fucked but VTWAX is my safety net.

62427417
I am also curious about DRAM can anyone tell me if it’s a good hold for a short while

item.title: UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1 — 174 replies — 144.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1

Open thread • Replies: 174 • Updated: 2026-06-29 16:43 UTC

OP

Brothers,

SpaceX has begun to rise. Its success or fall is of little importance to us in the short term.

In the meanwhile we must devise ways to gain a spot at the table with our kin in the six figure club.

I for one propose we spend our time learning a subject. Knowledge is the greatest wealth of all.

However, I would be remiss to not tell the truth that I haven't a clue what we should study.

So instead I suggest we create an eggregore for these threads. Others made monero-chan, bobo and sminem

I am thinking we create one based on a girl who would be willing to believe in us while we are poor and brave the pain throughout having to witness our more disappointing moments of action. Never losing faith in us, she is always there. Yes. This is how we shall spend our time.

At any rate, that is my suggestion for tonight's fun. I have to work in the morning so let's not get too rowdy. Take it or leave it. If you will take it, then be sure to double it and pass it on to the next anon.

Let us commence the general!

Come one, come all!

Early replies (first 3)

62373772
>>62373752
Jannies will surely delete these threads. Instead of creating an eggregore why not try something new and usurp an old one. It may be a derivative of one which has already been made.

62373798
>>62373772
Hello anon thanks for joining. You are poster #1. Your anime image shall be the eggregore. The "coffee" in the image is rather a good omen. We all know images with hot girls accompanied by a brief post on coffee attracts all the attention.

Now that matter is settled, help me add some links to this post here. This will be the header for the start of each general

Helpful links

>Educational materials
https://w9.kaijimanga.com/

>Looking to try the TCG route?
https://youtube.com/@alphainvestments69?si=tDAPjnRSZhyCIGP5

>Lost all hope?
https://www.indeed.com/


>Hidden in plain sight
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Limitless_(film)

>Games to strengthen you financial acumen
https://mahjongsoul.yo-star.com/

>Learn your from your betters
https://ia600609.us.archive.org/3/items/the-house-of-rothschild-ferguson-niall/The%20House%20of%20Rothschild%20-%20Ferguson%2C%20Niall.pdf
What is the name of that character in your post?

62373799
>>62373772
verily, a true fact

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62404737
>>62373752
its a spacex thread?
its time to buy o better buy in few days one week

62405715
bump

62407354
Page 8 bump, /biz/ must be losing money again because there's an uptick in activity.

62407450
almost 9 months since i started my first job after college
this feels stagnant and joyless
what exactly do i need to do to escape wageslavery and poverty

62407931
Someone send me ten grand so I can join the club, thanks

62408558
>>62407450
What were you doing in 2017, 2021 and December of 2024?

62408565
>>62407354
Thank you, my wage job prevents me from dedicating my energies to this thread but I should have some time soon

62408611
>>62408584
Wtf are you on about dude, yes I made 54 posts over the span of 8 days. I'm surprised you're not taking your own advice and leaving 4chan.

62410044
Bump

62410051
Under 10k you just need to have a job and save cash.
You need cash flow and if you dont have shit a job is the only way to start.

62410731
Bump

62411520
>>62408558
>2017
still in high school
>2021
still in uni
>December of 2024
just graduated and was looking for jobs (i still had 0 dollars to my name at that point)

62411614
>>62373752
>>62373772
>>62373798
>>62373799
>>62373803
>post Maccari's "Cicero Denounces Catiline" (1888)
>crop out Catiline
Fuck you OP, I'm glad you're poor.

62412314
>>62411520
You could've played the memecoin casino in 2021.

62413842
Bump, I'll be free tomorrow

62416357
Bump

62417812
page 9 bump. Don't say I never did anything for you.

62418065
Almost the weekend then I can devote my energies to this thread.

And a big thank you to the poster above this post, looks like you were based after all

62418133
Bump

62418220
I got out and made tens of dollars this week with MU and SNDK. Lost some with WDC.

62419326
This is very stupid but an anon in some other thread weeks ago shilled me TNYA. He gave no explanation, no catalyst, no description what the company even does but he said that we’ll be eating good in like 1-2 years I don’t even remember exactly when. But hey it’s a cheap stock and he sounded confident to me

62419390
go all in hbar when it bottoms at 0.03

62419964
Bump, just woke up, let's get started

62420874
It would appear that everyone is talking about the new WENDYs Stock

Naturally we should take some time to consider this potential moonshot. Could be a waste of time. In a few I will post information I find relevant to the stock and whether investing is the right option

62422903
Another page 9 bump

62423064
Good to see the thread is still going strong. Today is my off day, let's look into the next subject "predictive programming"

We'll start with Oliver tree

62425537
op was not a fag this thread has good vibes we should keep it going until we all make it
personally im trading perps with a system after 10 years of learning charts off/on but finally committing
did a 32x in 2021 and should have been able to retire but didnt anticipate the biden years so here we are going pure psycho mode like we did back then but even harder until money is /solved/, then I'll keep trading for the love of the game cuz it's the best sport in the world

62425849
>>62423064
This shit is way too schizo. No anon you can not predict the future. You can maybe foresee some type of market trends, seasonality or whatever but this is just ridiculous

62425890
>>62425537
Got any good tips/ressources on learning to trade charts? trying to get into it too

62427228
>>62425849
I concede. I'll look for a more productive venture but I won't let the thread or general die, it will be some time before value is struck, I will admit that. I can be tenacious if nothing else.

item.title: In his new vid, Tech Lead says the only way to have a rich lifestyle with deep satisfying creampies is to leave the US f… — 19 replies — 76.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
In his new vid, Tech Lead says the only way to have a rich lifestyle with deep satisfying creampies is to leave the US f…

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-06-29 17:52 UTC

OP

In his new vid, Tech Lead says the only way to have a rich lifestyle with deep satisfying creampies is to leave the US for poor countries. True?

Early replies (first 3)

62425430
>>62425420
At depends, did u boated an ad, yt saaar?

62425500
if you can get laid in the west you wont attract good women in the 3rd world, you are just going to pay the access to brown 5/10's

62425521
>>62425500
This is saarcope and you know it. Tiny browlettes in jungle countries unironically melt when 6ft snowchads pinch their tits.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62425535
>>62425420
If you're asian, unattractive, with a small dick, and money, then obviously your sexual strategy will be to be a passport bro and downplay the importance of looks.

62425559
Get the toonder in passport mode, plenty of post wall turd world might consider making a romantic life with him

62425994
>>62425420
love doesn't exist. once we accept this, it's easy to understand that being scammed by women in third world countries is much cheaper than being scammed by women in first world countries.

62426288
>>62425521
kek
fr I like getting my shaft creamed on by non white chicks

62426850
>>62425420
why is the dude always so negative, is it because he is low test? he seems like a lil bitch ngl

62426867
>>62426288
>>62425521
This is just more racemixing promotion for white people to genocide them

62426887
>>62426850
>wife kidnapped his kids back to asia
>loses all his money leverage gambling

62426905
>>62426887
I thought he was a google tech ceo or something. He always portraits himself as some kind of genious high iq tech genious but that retard was just leverag trading shitcoints and got lucky once lol

62426910
>>62426905
He was a tech bro before getting fired for making videos I think.

62427289
>>62425535
this. Tech lead is a 3.5/10 at best
Bad hairline, asian, no eye brows, long face, glasses, soulless bug eyes, no muscle, likely short, robot voice, no charisma. 0 chance he can date anyone besides some uggo asian or gold digger who's planning to divorce rape him within 3 years

>>62425994
how is it any different? divorce rape is the same if you bring them back and it's not worth living in their countries

>>62426905
he's prob 130-140 IQ, but he got greedy with the leverage stuff and didn't factor enough risk management.

62427388
>>62426905
his name, Tech Lead, is from the time he was the tech lead of the Youtube iOS app at Google 2014-2018 then he worked for Facebook for a few years until he got fired and started posting videos of him complaining about Facebook being woke and women in tech

62427429
>>62425420
Why is he so entitled?

62427439
>>62426867
whiteoids are already done for thanks to placating the jews
just enjoy the end while it lasts faggot

62427455
A huge warn you to think twice before getting an asian wife who would take your white child and run to China or Russia to some remote village that would have left no trace to find them.

62427460
Dude look like having hair thinning lmao, he is gonna have a bad taste in the late life desu. Welcome to the true color of the cruel world.

62427468
America is western civilians. Countries outside of the U.S. dont follow celebrity culture. So yes. Outside of america is freedom if you know how to live off the land.

item.title: >boss put me on a PIP 2 months ago >PIP requiernments is classical non sensical bullshit >dont even come close to fuflin… — 53 replies — 65.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
>boss put me on a PIP 2 months ago >PIP requiernments is classical non sensical bullshit >dont even come close to fuflin…

Open thread • Replies: 53 • Updated: 2026-06-29 17:07 UTC

OP

>boss put me on a PIP 2 months ago
>PIP requiernments is classical non sensical bullshit
>dont even come close to fuflining any of it anyways
>PIP ended last Tuesday
>haven't heard anything from anyone, still employed
Am I getting fired or not? I got a feeling im not out of the woods and they are just collecting paperwork. My boss said he had to talk to HR when i asked him about my PIP 2 weeks ago. The omly chace i have is that they were gonna fire me but deicded to keep me for a bit longer for some tax reason or something. I job hopped a lot and needed to last at this company for a few years to restore my reputation.. Really paranoid about losing it cuz im fucked if i do. Genuinely thinking of becoming a fetenoyl dealer beacuse being a career cuck is the worst torture imaginable

Early replies (first 3)

62423284
Most companies are downsizing so yeah, if they put you on PIP there's like a 99% chance they're just doing the legal mumbo jumbo so you can't sue after they fire you

62423286
>>62423284
Why haven't they fired me yet? Its fucked up that they are downsizing yet trying to make us feel like we arent worth dog shit and are chasing giant problems for the comapny by existing when we are really actually working hard the whole time

62423287
>>62423286
>Why haven't they fired me yet?
Like I said, companies need to go through a lot of legal mumbo jumbo so the fired employee can't sue them for wrongful termination

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62423536
>>62423434
>Don't people usually get fired after a PIP
ftfy. And yes. But there's not really a time limit where they have to fire you within x days of the end of your PIP. The purpose of a PIP is to establish that you are unable to achieve acceptable performance levels, they can fire you at any time after that. It sounds like they're probably still interviewing your replacement.

62423543
>>62423531
Nobody goes through the expense of conducting interviews for ghost jobs though. You're just not good enough.

62423546
>>62423543
>Nobody goes through the expense of conducting interviews
you aren't familiar with HR roasties who need to justify their salary are you

62423552
>>62423546
For real. These women have nothing to do all day long and they love sitting in meetings because it makes them feel important.

62423557
>>62423543
>>62423546
He also isn't familiar with the fact that the HR roasites are actually helping their company by enabling keniving behavior like doing fake interviews so investory falsely think they are growing, excuses to hire overbroad or promote internallyfor 1/4th the prices cuz they legally have to try to hire someone in the US first or just general data gathering that they sell off to supplement their income. The HR roasitie probably pays for her salary and then some alone just form selling all the data..

62423561
>>62423543
Also, after this many interviews, its statistically impossible that its my fault at this point..

62423573
>>62423561
You are the common denominator in your repeated failures to get hired.

62423575
dude
they literally have scent receptors for Cluster A
it's your fault the way you were born

62423587
>>62423573
>muh common denominator
Ironically its the same problem who say
>causation doemst equal correlation

Unwilling to look deeper into subject and never took an actual probability class. Ghost jobs are everywere right now.
>>62423575
Im in engineering so idk why it would be a problem for them anyways.

62423819
>>62423278
The PIP shit is just so they have an excuse not to give you a raise.

62424578
>>62423819
They already denied me my raise before putting me on the PIP. If its just that I will be relived

62424616
>>62423286
Really hope you started looking for another job, the PIP shit is just to cover for legal issues, so they can fire you without compensation depending on which fucked up state you live in. Don't panic but do look for another job. A PIP has never ever saved anyone unless you actually pass it so they have to wait a few months before trying again

62424656
>>62423291
They probably forgot anon. Has happened to me many times, I even blow off entire jobs sometimes on the hope that everyone just forgets.

62424748
>>62423286
>really actually working hard the whole time
There's your problem

62425104
>>62423278
Take the hint anon, they already put you on a pip so they want to get rid of you.

No employer puts a member of staff on a pip that they want to keep.

62425117
>>62423531
wonder what the purpose of doing this is

62425123
>>62423291
>PIP is over
Lmao. PIP is never over. They're throwing your wagie ass a life preserver of being able to find a job while you're still employed. It's a win-win for both of you right now. You can job hunt and they don't have to send your shit to legal to start justifying firing you. Ask your manager if you completed your PIP to satisfaction, if they say yes work on your resume. If they say no you have like 2 months before you have to explain why you lost your last job while applying to 20 jobs a day.

62425193
Once you get a pip, you can just stop caring entirely and stop doing your job until they fire you, right? There's no advantage to playing it out because you're not going to qualify for unemployment anyways?

62425239
And now you're always a target. You'll always have that mark. That's only if you make it though. Typically you're not supposed to anyway. PIP is just a means of managing someone out.
Don't think so?
>anon made some mistakes with his work and could do better
>person 1 gets off the record advice and coaching to improve
>person 2 gets documented instances of feedback (paper trail)
>person 1 just does the improvement and keeps going along and it's like nothing ever happened
>person 2 now has company processes and paperwork showing me he has room for improvement and here's the action plan you can do to be considered worthy of your job, maybe does it and passes, always has that mark, affects potential promotions, raises, etc and typically just is gotten rid of anyway
If you're on PIP, you're not wanted. Simple as.
If they wanted you to simply improve they would simply get on call with you and tell you what you can do better without any of the docs. Docs are just suws to get rid of you while having a legit appearance so they don't risk getting sued.

62425640
>>62425239
>>62423329
read my post loser, its just toxic management

in my case i had a brown middle manager that could not stand the fact that i was not answering his teams messages in less than 2 hours and also that i never asked for my payslips when all my coworkers were crying like bitches everytime the salary was late for 1-2 days

when we got laid off we had a 2 months notice (its the rule in my country) and during two months i made fun of him constantly, i was even travelling during my shift and blocked his number when he called me as i was in the taxi in bangkok

62426158
>>62423278
Why did they put you on a PIP? Can you give a good faith recounting of their reasons and not just
>fucking bullshit
>my manager is a cunt
>toxic workplace blah blah blah

62426163
PIP is currently closed due to AIDS. You forgot to use a condom on Juneteenth.

62426164
Once you are doubted at work it's the beginning of the end.
Start looking elsewhere.

62426165
>>62425193
Correct.

62426309
>>62423397
op keeps making this same post weekly.

1. he is poor. this is why he is so scared of getting fired.
2. he isn't that bright (see #1).

how can you be posting on /biz/ and not have a giant stack in at least something. seriously, most anons here at least have 25k in soxl, gold, or fucking pokemon cards. do better anon.

62426321
>>62426309
25K?

kek

you can't even buy a garage in bulgaria with this

62426369
>>62426321
for an emergency fund you illiterate negro. 25k in theory would be enough to float him enough to find new employment so that he isn't forced to continue letting his manager control his life.

62426383
>>62426369
he can just quiet quit instead of spending his savings

62427319
>>62426164
I tried, no luck, im fucked

62427324
>>62426158
I didnt get enlightened point assigned to me and one of my managers told me to work on the tasks while the other one told me not to and it was a constant back and fourth, shit out of my control
>>62425239
Ye i know but there are no jobs out there.

item.title: Theyre ending the Chainlink BUILD program — 113 replies — 54.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Theyre ending the Chainlink BUILD program

Open thread • Replies: 113 • Updated: 2026-06-29 15:51 UTC

OP

LMAO!!!!!

https://chain.link/blog/build-program-evolution

Early replies (first 3)

62417511
xrp is the chosen coin…it’s undeniable at this point

62417512
Come on man, this shit still spamming after 8 years? Just give it up. There are thousands of other coins.

62417514
"Chainlink Labs is transitioning from payments made in project tokens to focusing on commercial agreements involving fees paid in LINK or other liquid assets that can be readily converted to LINK."

Build members will buy my bags?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62423262
Kek

62423276
>>62422761
Always been the case. Before it comes morons push whatever release as "they key" that will unlock all token value and you need to have your ducks in a row beforehand. Then it passes and they go fucking radio silent. Then half a year later that thing was never a big deal anyway and we should all not talk about it.

You had spastics making charts about how BUILD alone would return $1-2 per link staked each month. If you mentioned what a universal collection of utter vaporware shit the projects were you would get called a fudder.

62423282
>>62417535
Sir Gay indeed.

62423283
>>62423276
You're talking to yourself.
Nobody keeps tabs on every single granular development from a project they hate for years, but here you are juggling IDs pretending there are dozens of you.

62423312
>>62423276
My wife asked me where we're going to go on vacation this year with the money we made from the folk finance drop. I don't have the heart to tell her that we might be able to split a kids meal at Applebee's. She looks up to me as an intelligent head of the house.

62423353
60k link staked.. 20k USD a year... i needed the build rewards to fuck around with...

62423360
>>62423276
/thread
the constant gaslighting is even more annoying desu
>samefags reeeeeee

62423389
>>62423360
Why are you even reading this "gaslighting"? Who's forcing you to be here?

62423462
>>62423259
Hilarious deflection after doing this
>>62422274

The absolute state

62423474
>>62423353
How does 2 million a year sound?

62424023
>>62423283
I kept granular details on a project i own for years, to my incomprehensible regret

62424140
>>62423276
The sad fact of the matter is that jeetlinkers will still be delirious off copium a decade from now, even after CLL pulls the plug in five years beforehand.

62424195
good. i never could participate in build anyway as a US fag

62424386
>>62422668
It literally says "the most recent season of Chainlink Rewards will mark the conclusion of Build-related token rewards, with claims ending on July 7, 2026" meaning no season 2+ of build rewards going to stakers.

It also says "Proceeds from these new agreements are expected to be programmatically converted to LINK and used to support the growth of the network through programs such as the Chainlink Reserve." meaning that link goes to the reserve, not to stakers.

Previously
>stakers will get build rewards

Now
>Chainlink gets paid in link

62424528
xswap isnt even on cow swap? where do you sell this trash?

62424728
S E X

62424821
>>62424386
Brutal

62425620
>>62424023
>this project has always been pushed by morons
>also I've been holding this project for years

You're lying. And brown.

>>62424386
You're a brown ESL monkey who doesn't even know what the words "such as" mean.
Protip: the same exact words were used when Build was first introduced.

62425675
>>62417503
HAHAHAHAHAHAHA Another nail in the coffin and shovel full of dirt in the grave on the biggest retail fraud in token history.

62425681
>>62419638
Link is underperforming fucking death spiraled LUNC since Trump revived crypto. Lol And by a lot.

62425687
>>62419707
>A chainlink shill calling someone else brown.

62425699
>>62422159
>>62423276
Perfectly said.

62425962
>>62425620
I'm a 100k link holder. I have more link than you.

"Such as" isn't very fucking reliable. All of this would be fine if link was valued as it should be but it fucking isn't, with no clear path to gaining that value.

62425980
>>62425962
>CLL uses "such as" in 2022 when launching Build
>THIS IS SET IN STONE

>CLL uses "such as" in 2026 when changing Build
>THIS IS NOT VERY FUCKING RELIABLE

You're a brown paid fuddie.

62426004
>>62425980
I'm also whiter than you, Yank.

62426010
>>62425980
>>62425620
post a picture of your hand with timestamp

62426949
i am just getting caught up on this news after the weekend. my my my how the mighty have fallen

i predicted all of this for the last few years but the boyscouts couldn't handle it

>duuuuuuuuuuuude i need a team of tax attorneys for the heckin rewards

BAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHHAHAHAH

look at you now. an expensive lesson on controlling your ego. you needed it tho


your hubris was your downfall

THE Cuckolds of crypto

62426967
>>62417512
>There are thousands of other coins.

LOL this dude stuck in 2021. that's your conclusion bro, just buy other scam coins?

don't you people get it? altcoins are dead. capital moved back to actual companies in the stock market. only a retarded sap would continue donating to a bunch of nerds for a "whitepaper"


>>62417833
>I'll also (again just playing the other side) point out the regardless of whether or not it ultimately benefits the LINK token, Chainlink is realistically one of like 5 crypto projects amongst the hundreds of "legitimate" ones that actually is seeing real adoption and has a huge use case that is surviving the infantile stages of crypto, and not just surviving but will thrive. So again, who knows if this ultimately helps the token price, but I do understand why linkies hold onto some faith still.

so are you just a fan of the company?

>>62417873
>It’s all push and pull. Ying yang. If you have 20 million earning you 800k (500k post tax) per year

who the fuck would do that? the $20m has drawn down 80% so no, life is not good. anyone not retarded would've parked most of that in the s&p500 and has been making at least 15% per year

if you really wanted pathetic 4% return you could get that in a savings account where your only risk is that actual bank going bust

62427007
>>62418846
> The opportunity to invest in something like Chainlink - core infrastructure with insane value capture potential, has never really existed before. The closest thing maybe would be investing in AMZN prior to cloud services,

you are not invested in chainlink. you made a donation kid

amazon's revenue in year 7 was $3B. and that's in 2001 numbers. you can go ahead and stop comparing to your shitcoin bro you're embarrassing yourself

>>62420893
>The fuck is that analogy lmao. This isn't a casino you dumb faggot, real people invested real money into an asset that promised certain things by certain dates and they have not only underdelivered but are starting to actively ignore those promises.

it's the end stage of a cult investment where they turn on each other. it somehow becomes the fault of the "community" on why they didnt make any money.

in order to preserve their ego, guys like >>62420825 have to spin the story that you'd have to be crazy to expect any kind of gains. mind you the rest of the world's market all hit all time highs while you are down 80-90%. by creating this narrative, he avoids recognizing he's holding a really bad investment and can continue on thinking he's a secret genius.

62427022
remember this old pasta? still relevant today. every cl product roughly follows this life cycle

item.title: Thinking seriously of finally capitulating and selling my 12,000 DOT at ATL of $0.80 and realizing a 100k net loss Bitco… — 27 replies — 29.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Thinking seriously of finally capitulating and selling my 12,000 DOT at ATL of $0.80 and realizing a 100k net loss Bitco…

Open thread • Replies: 27 • Updated: 2026-06-29 17:01 UTC

OP

Thinking seriously of finally capitulating and selling my 12,000 DOT at ATL of $0.80 and realizing a 100k net loss

Bitcoin is more likely to go to 500k than dot going to $8

It's over

What do you think

Early replies (first 3)

62423104
Why on earth did you invest in that garbage in the first place?

62423107
>>62423104
My friend convinced me. Wish he was never born. Cocksucker

62423116
>>62423107
it must be traumatizing, I have seen you in like 4 different threads. And I actually do believe you, no LARP goes for this long. There will be more opportunities, maybe it's not in equities or speculative "assets" this time.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62423121
>>62423107
honestly dude this sounds insane but in the sheer absolute bumfuck rarity that DOT recovers. you're going to commit suicide if it moons. I know this sounds highly irrational but $9600 is inconsequential money unless you have debt. it sounds fucking nuts but maybe just park it safely and just genuinely forget about it.

62423122
>>62423121
>you're going to commit suicide if it moons
if you realize losses now*

this is purely psychological, it's shit financial advice and it's a gamblers fallacy but im telling you the way you're talking about this shows me if DOT moons you will not cope. It's already traumatizing missing out on the semiconductor/AI boom then having to miss the very asset you invested in recover would make ME want to blow my brains out and I have never had suicidal depression

62423140
>>62423116
>>62423121
>>62423122
Least insane DOT baggie

62423143
>>62423140
dumb misunderstanding but I get it, I am just saying 88% loss is devastating. if it was options, people just let it expire at that point

62423206
>>62423121
9600 dollar is still a huge amount to let go to zero

62423207
>>62423066
Polkadot will have a glorious comeback.

62423212
>>62423207
This confirms it's going to zero, the troll bot arrived

62423218
>>62423116
My life is ruined. Even though by the grace of God I managed to earn a good living and financially keep body and soul together, it haunts me every day. And dot is less than half of my total wreckage. We are talking 250k down the hole net loss

62423224
>>62423212
You know what's funny? I'm not even the guy who usually posts these. I just downloaded this image and started pretending to be him. I've been doing it for a few weeks now, and I've never bought a cent of DOT.

62423227
>>62423224
>shill decay to the point people are doing ironic shills
grim

62423253
>>62423227
The current 'Wendy's General' is also mine. I thought people would just make fun of it, but most took it seriously. I think that there are other ironic shills, the 'Polkadot General' wasn't mine.

62423261
>>62423212
Bear market. Remember this

62423309
>>62423261
We aren't in a bear market yet

62423332
>>62423066
Sell, treat yourself to a trip with the proceeds to unwind, and then make a fresh start with genuine assets.

62424184
>>62423066
>He didn't set a stop loss
Dumbfuck

62424714
>>62423104
Back then I recall DOT was getting a lot of support by the sorts of people that want to enslave everybody and to some cynical fucks investing in something that the people that salivate about fake crypto govie tokens that auto-track and auto-tax seemed like a safe bet.

62424732
>>62423066
Well I can tell you at very least it wont recover in the next 31 days so you can at least loss harvest for your taxes, and buy it back then. Probably at a much lower price.

Or it moons to 1k and you want to shoot me. So yea not investment advice, just saying you could if you wanted to.

62425540
>>62423066
>this is purely psychological, it's shit financial advice and it's a gamblers fallacy but im telling you the way you're talking about this shows me if DOT

Dude just DCA

Its 80 fucking cents

You can get your position cost average down 70% if you throw like 16k in it now

62426389
>>62423066
Pretty sure we've reached rock bottom. I'm still holding my crypto project, no matter how little I believe DOT will pump I think we're set for an whale accumulation phase. There are more solid project out there, though. Also new more favorably shilled upcoming ones that can gain the hype some of us chase, but I hold on my original thesis on my project. The WEF'ers are in on Sol as the new Eth, however buck broken the code is they're only interested in control. There are a lot of new liquidity focused copies of this appearing the top 50 exactly now.
A good indicator would be how much seasonal slander is going on. There's no slander on Gavin for being gay or his staff from jumping ship to the project DOT copied their consensus mechanism from. You will have to learn how to find trustworthiness in people who deliver on their promises. I wouldn't have dreamed of how much Monero gained confidence, lately. I honestly had thought the decoupling from major exchanges was dooming them ,but they're ahead of the curve.

62427015
12k @ 7,5$
I dont care.
I sell at 75 in 2030 or 2032

62427021
15 not 12

62427073
>>62427015
Vishnu?

62427298
>>62425540
People like you deserve terrible things

62427302
>>62426389
>Pretty sure we've reached rock bottom

There is no bottom. It will get much much much much worse

item.title: ALTERNATIVE CASH STREAMS / SIDE JOBS / AI GRIFT / SIDE HUSTLES — 33 replies — 28.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
ALTERNATIVE CASH STREAMS / SIDE JOBS / AI GRIFT / SIDE HUSTLES

Open thread • Replies: 33 • Updated: 2026-06-29 16:46 UTC

OP

We all wanna make money on /biz/ right? Instead of chasing returns or making big bets can we discuss actual proven ways to make some money on the side? I have been trying to find easy, not effortless mind you just easy, ways to make money on the side. The total doesn’t have to be big, just consistent. Does anyone have ideas? If it could be something friendly to a noob in that particular field, even better
I know stuff like drop shipping is a fucking scam, flipping Facebook marketplace stuff is not for me
The most common examples you see online are donating plasma and using online survey sites
Does anyone know of anything better, maybe with AI? If so please explain it in detail with examples of how much money you’ve made.
Oh and one more thing YES I HAVE A SALARY JOB AND ALREADY GOT A RAISE FOCUS ON THIS BEING ABOUT SIDE MONEY

Early replies (first 3)

62416647
There still a market for banana-in-your-butt on chaturbate or onlyfans.

Or there's always wendy's

62416661
>>62416647
Ummm how would one make money with Wendy’s silly

62417058
oil is rugging

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62417092
>>62416542
foot modelling

62417962
.

62418176
It's hit and miss and slow, but over the last year I've won $100 playing slot machine apps. I haven't deposited any money in the apps either.

62419720
Bumping

62419807
Mow your neighbors’ lawns you lazy bastard

62420024
>>62419807
theres already companies doing that for citycucks

62420042
>>62416542
what sites even pay for surveys?

62420049
>>62420042
prolific

62420106
>>62419720
https://www.dataannotation.tech/
never tried it, i just found it

62421306
ANYONE

62421335
>>62418176
Yeah? How's that work? They keep a tally of what you owe and you just never pay it if your winnings exceed what you owe? And what apps do you like to use?

62421341
>>62420106
They are fairly selective, but hire people in waves every couple months iirc. I've worked a year on the site and the work has gotten more difficult as AI advances. Requires some focus and brainpower for most tasks nowadays. Less a side hustle and more a part time job imo. If you have specialty knowledge from a degree like stem or law tho could be a great gig until AI is advanced enough to not need you.

62421350
>>62420049
Hate that site. Everything is automated including whatever the hell they use to decide to ban people. Feels like the whole thing is just ran by chatgpt hallucinating everything.

62421354
>>62420106
these things are absolute garbage unless you live in india

62422162
>>62416542
Just get a part time job. I make $18 dollars an hour working part time a pizza hut as a cook 9 hours a week, and I can get all the free pizza I want.

62423053
>>62422265
So what you’re saying is we need to put our autistic minds together and start scamming Google? Got it

62423544
>>62422162
>Just get a part time job
This shit is fucking impossible right now if you aren't mexican and don't speak fluent spanish. In the states.

62423599
>>62422162
>just get a part time job
working full time is enough, finding a job is hard enough too

62424535
.

62424537
Even onlyfan models and pornhub models are struggling in this economy.

62424544
FYI. Job stands for Just over Broke. In case no one knew this. Start a business save yourselves go into debt. Its the banks problem.

62424548
>>62416542
>The most common examples you see online are donating plasma
making $20 every 2 months sounds like a winning strat

62424553
>>62421335
I was using Stake and a few others, but they got banned in my state.
I'm using Cash Crown Casino now. You play with cash coins and can exchange them when you hit $50. You get small rewards for signing in daily and it adds up. I lucked out and won $50 on one spin and $40 on another.

62424554
>>62424548
you can do it every week and get 50-100

62424606
>>62424554
sorry but not donating away my lifeforce to some big pharma jew for a miserable pitance. Only people i can imagine doing this on the reg are drug addicts/bums.

62424611
>>62424606
I'm neither of those and do it. I'm able to get $125 a week, $500 a month. It's not a super huge amount but it's close to my house and lets me use that money to build savings and investments faster.

62424717
>>62416542
Well if you want to actually invest and know your money is growing over time, and you're genuine. Then you should consider viewpoint214.com.

62425904
>>62424611
How long does it take

62426054
Gig apps. I multi app Doordash, Uber Eats, Walmart Spark, Instacart and Amazon Flex. I average over $25/hr using my wife's EV. In better markets you could easily average over $30/hr.

62427240
>>62417092
Tons of girls try selling feet pics and most end up with nothing to show (they have no branding)

>>62424537
this

item.title: How do I monetize this boys? — 5 replies — 20.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
How do I monetize this boys?

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-06-29 17:43 UTC

OP

I am 100% serious.
No racisms in this thread, just figuring out how this could be done legally in the United States or in the UK.

Early replies (first 3)

62427108
>>62427104
Invest in designated shitting streets

62427110
it's already a thing
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TggdK8_K-sM

62427281
>>62427110
I saw this too lol.
May have contributed to what inspired the idea.
Eddie Hall is hilarious by the way. I have a young coworker with his almost identical personality who has become a sort of surrogate little brother to me.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62427369
>>62427110
I'd pay $50 to watch bryan shaw go bare knuckle against 10 indians

62427445
Again, I am being 100% serious, I have absolutely no desire to harm Black Americans.

item.title: Micron and DRAM — 3 replies — 12.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Micron and DRAM

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-06-29 17:42 UTC

OP

While obviously no one can predict the future perfectly, it seems foolish to not invest in something related to AI RAM / HBM Production for the next few years as contracts are already made and supply is bottlenecking
Given what I say is true, which would you guys say is a better choice to start pumping my paychecks into (I already have $60,000 in a market ETF and want more upside)
For some reason my gut is siding towards DRAM, still heavily concentrated but at least has some diversification
It seems like those top 3 companies in it are just making more and more supply deals
Additionally, every piece of evidence I read suggests memory will bottleneck for another year or two
Is it smart to just start DCA into DRAM and then sell once I’ve had my fill (not expecting a perfect pull out timing!)
Again I just wanna do this rather than simply doing stuff into VOO or VGT or something
How much of this is hype and how much of this is brain dead free money that will beat the market
Please be serious and honest

Early replies (first 3)

62427339
>>62427323
you will be eaten mark my words. most of these companies have massive software bloat on their ai's and you wont even get a good exit when all these contracts get put on hold indef while they operate on half of what they are already using and beating metrics by 2 or 3x. the tendency of programming efficency will take your ass out. there will be no warning and demand will cease.

62427365
>>62427339
Is the demand not coming from a need though? At first it was GPUs but now everything doesn’t have enough memory to communicate at the necessary level

62427441
>>62427323
that's a 4 at best

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: FUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU — 22 replies — 10.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
FUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU

Open thread • Replies: 22 • Updated: 2026-06-29 15:55 UTC

OP

I HAD IT AT 126K WHY I DIDNT SELL WHYYYYYY AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHHHHHHHH

62424098
>>62424096
nigger, I should have been a multi-billionaire by now, we all fuck up

62424103
>>62424096
Just turn back time and sell at 126k. It's not that hard

62424104
Someone had to hold the bags anon. Why not you?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62424108
My BTC is still 126k on my ledger

62424112
>>62424096
Greed combined with retardation.

62424148
>>62424096
The miser loses twice. No refunds.

62424150
You didn't lock in your BTC at $120k with your Trezor...?
Couldn't be me.

62424174
Me when I didn't buy Microstrategy when it was 20 bucks and sell at 330.

62424188
>>62424096
HAHAH BAGGIE

62424200
>>62424096
Just wait and shut the fuck up there is one play that works in crypto ONE PlAY. What you do is stack and then wait for a bull run then sell when they start saying "bitcoin is going to ten million" when all the normies get crypto fever u need to sell this cycle has happened over four times. Stack and sell make a few million and shut the fuck up

item.title: 460k€ here. Im a NEET jobless and 0 job experience and 0 education. I need to gamble this and get a 3x but everything fe… — 10 replies — 6.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
460k€ here. Im a NEET jobless and 0 job experience and 0 education. I need to gamble this and get a 3x but everything fe…

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-06-29 16:24 UTC

OP

460k€ here. Im a NEET jobless and 0 job experience and 0 education. I need to gamble this and get a 3x but everything feels pumped as fuck. Im a moonk and live with my mom. I made this on the hey day of adsense on youtube, made 90k on MSTR, lost 1.5k last year feardumping the rest of my MSTR shares. Dodged a massive bullet there.

So now, what do I buy? I was late on AI datacenters, I was late on memory stocks, I was late on photonics. BTC? it's scary as fuck man. But probably to get rich you have to buy MSTR again under 100 but it's too fucking scare tbqh. So what the fuck do we buy? I need a cool 3x.

I barely have any expenses because I like an hikikomori. I want to go to the gym to swim, but that's 100€ for one with a pool + 20€ for public transport a month.

I spend around 200€ a month in groceries, 44€ for internet and phone, 70€ every 2 months or so in finasteride+minoxidil foam.

I have been doing some one-time stuff like repairing the shower and other things. Cost me like fucking 2900€. I have already bought all the clothes I need. So im focusing on covering basic expenses without working and try to 3x the capital.

Inb4 some dumbass says "buy x dividend stock that's volatile as fuck but muh yield, buy the sp500 and withdraw 4% yearly etc, get a job, this is enough to live in x country" jfl

Early replies (first 3)

62422982
My goal is to have enough on these 4 ETFs and make a living from the dividends:

VHYL
TDIV
FGEQ
ISPA

These ETFs would give me monthly dividends (because at least one of them pay on a month) and I would be mega divesified. I would have proof of income, pay from real earnings and not this dumb ass wishful thinking of withdrawing 4% because muh optimization.

The problem, I need at least a fucking million € to get a decent wage after taxes, and if I put them in there now, I will not be able to make enough money fast enough. I have like 40€ in a savings account that gives me like 2% and the rest is in money market funds and a fund that is very defensive. Im not withdrawing from there, but from the 40k€ savings account because it sucks seeing your compounding stuff go down in shares.

This is so fucking retarded. I should have at least 1 million by now. But Jewtube fucked me so now I have to gamble this capital before I run out of money with these small monthly expenses. I cannot leave my bedroom until dividend payments pay for a decent lifestyle but what the fuck do you buy to get rich fast when everything has ran so much.


This is so fucking retarded. I should have at least 1 million by now. But Jewtube fucked me so now I have to gamble this capital before I run out of money with these small monthly expenses. I cannot leave my bedroom until dividend payments pay for a decent lifestyle but what the fuck do you buy to get rich fast when everything has ran so much. Seeing MU moon is like seeing BTC moon while are you are not investment. FUCKING FUCK STUPID BITHCASS NIGger another FUCKING SUMMER NOT RICH? FUCK THIS STUPID ASS FUCK FIELD TOO LONG FUCK THAT UUUDE AND FUCK THE CAPATCHAS FILLING CAPTCHAS IN THE MIDDLE OF THE SUMMER LIKE A FUCKING RETARDFUCKING AAAAHAHAAHH MUUUUUU MMUMUUUU MUUU WHAT DO I BUY FUCKEERSS EVERYTHING MOON BTC WHEN BOTTOM NIGGEER MSTR TO 50 THEN TO 1000 HOW DO YOU BUY THIS IN TOTAL FEAR YOU STUDPIF FUCKING

62423521
>>62422982
why do you need proof of income? just buy vwce and do 6% rule (4% rule is too low now) or use margin account to withdraw cash as debt

also, of those etfs you will pay twice the withholding tax except on TDIV because it has FBI status

62423564
Just buy wendys stock tmrw

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62423610
>>62422981
You into gaming? Consider gaming stocks. Just keep in mind they might seem illogical so do your research first on how the price acts in relation to news and releases.

62425635
As eurofag you can buy the l&g dividend ETF, pays out monthly, so you'd be at 13800 dividends a year, which seems for your life plenty, maybe even just park enough cash in there to cover your expenses you mentioned.

62425668
>>62425635
dividends are dumb

62426306
>>62422981
you lucked out, now protect it

>buy 400k of Allianz for the dividend
buy 400k of Allianz for the dividend
>buy 400k of Allianz for the dividend
buy 400k of Allianz for the dividend
>buy 400k of Allianz for the dividend
buy 400k of Allianz for the dividend
>buy 400k of Allianz for the dividend
buy 400k of Allianz for the dividend

62426335
>>62425668
For awhile there I was just a little in the red on all the stocks I ever sold but the dividends is what gave me a profit on trading stocks. Until last month I finally sold something high that is. Depends on what you get. Often it just pays pennies that don't matter. Others all you need is a few shares to be getting back several dollars per pay day. Own enough shares of one thing or have it spread out in multiple stocks with dividends and you get quite a bit of money per year going directly into your holding cash. Either reinvest that to transfer to your bank account every so often. Some stocks mostly crab and you get paid while you wait for the bull run. My advice for OP is to wait out the bull market. It is very unlikely to get a 3x return in anything soon. So don't do much right now. Just buy a little bit into something that is pre-dumped. I'd go for rebounds.

62427139
>>62422981
why dont you just wait until theres a correction dip in the markets and buy a 2x SPY/QQQ Position and try and catch a 20-50% move off a correction with leverage on a broad market etf?

This may or may not be financial advice.

We should be on counting fat stacks on a beach.

62427152
>>62422981

The internet loves to scare men into believing that marrying a slightly "post-wall" woman is some kind of catastrophic mistake. Reality says otherwise. If anything, there is plenty to gain.

A woman in her 30s isn't magically different from who she was a few years earlier. She still has the same personality, values, humor, ambitions, and capacity to love. What often changes is experience. She knows herself better, communicates more clearly, has less patience for games, and is more intentional about building a lasting relationship.

The horror stories endlessly recycled by "beta man" doom-posters are just that—stories. They cherry-pick the worst cases while ignoring the countless happy couples living ordinary, fulfilling lives. If age alone determined relationship success, no one would have a good marriage after 30.

The idea that a woman suddenly loses all relationship value after crossing an arbitrary age threshold is internet mythology, not reality. In many cases, a slightly older woman is like fine wine: more refined, more confident, more emotionally mature, and far easier to build a stable future with.

Judge people by their character, integrity, compatibility, and shared goals—not by an imaginary "wall." A strong marriage is built on trust, respect, attraction, and commitment. Those qualities don't expire with a birthday.
